response:
Certainly! Here's a more polished version of your email:

Subject: Request for Meeting Recordings

Dear Professor Klump,

I hope you are doing well. I would like to inquire whether the meetings scheduled for Tuesday night are recorded and posted on Blackboard. This is important to me because of a 7-hour time difference between our locations (Kosovo, GMT+2) which means the meetings would begin at 1:30 am and end at 3 am for me. If the meetings are recorded, that would be very convenient.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.
